name: Gooten Print-on-Demand Manufacturing API
what_it_does: Gooten print-on-demand manufacturing REST API for e-commerce businesses and brands to automate custom product fulfillment across 150+ product types through Gooten's global network of vetted manufacturers, with emphasis on enterprise brands and businesses needing multi-vendor manufacturing routing, advanced inventory management, and dedicated account management alongside POD capabilities including apparel, accessories, home goods, and promotional products. Enables AI agents to manage product catalog for available manufacturing item automation, handle order submission for POD fulfillment automation, access shipping rates for cost calculation automation, retrieve order status for production tracking automation, manage variant configuration for product customization automation, handle image upload for design file automation, access pricing for margin calculation automation, retrieve webhook for order event automation, manage returns for post-fulfillment automation, and integrate Gooten with Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom storefronts for enterprise print-on-demand automation.
use_cases: Fulfilling custom branded merchandise orders for enterprise and DTC brand automation agents
Automating multi-product POD order routing for e-commerce store management automation agents
Calculating product and shipping costs for pricing and margin optimization automation agents
Managing order returns and replacements for post-fulfillment customer service automation agents
not_for: High-volume offset printing (Gooten is print-on-demand unit fulfillment not offset production runs)
Digital product delivery (Gooten is physical product manufacturing and fulfillment only)
Budget-first POD without account management (Gooten is enterprise/mid-market oriented with pricing to match)
best_when: An enterprise brand, mid-market e-commerce business, or large DTC merchant wanting AI agents to automate custom product manufacturing and fulfillment through Gooten's vetted manufacturer network with dedicated account support.
avoid_when: VENDOR ROUTING IS AUTOMATIC: Gooten automatically routes to best vendor; automated specific manufacturer control creates inability to guarantee vendor selection; automated must accept Gooten's routing decisions. IMAGE SPECIFICATION VARIES BY PRODUCT: Each product type has specific image requirements; automated universal image spec assumption creates rejected artwork; automated must check product-specific artwork requirements from catalog. ENTERPRISE PRICING REQUIRES NEGOTIATION: Gooten's enterprise pricing is negotiated based on volume; automated public pricing assumption creates sticker shock at production pricing; automated pricing estimates require validated pricing from Gooten account manager. API KEY IS ACCOUNT-SPECIFIC: Gooten uses per-account API keys with specific vendor tree configuration; automated key sharing across accounts creates incorrect vendor routing.

auth.notes: Gooten uses API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. New York, NY HQ. Founded 2013. Products: 150+ product types, apparel, accessories, home goods, promotional. SDKs: None public. Enterprise-focused with dedicated account management. Ships globally. GDPR, PCI-DSS. Competes with Printful and Printify for enterprise POD.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free sandbox; production charges per order; enterprise pricing negotiated
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-product cost + shipping; enterprise volume discounts negotiated with account manager
pricing.notes: New York NY. Per-product + shipping. Enterprise pricing negotiated. Account manager for enterprise clients.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; order and catalog APIs throttled; webhooks for order events

known_agent_gotchas: PRODUCT RECIPE REQUIRED: Gooten uses 'recipes' (product configurations with SKU + artwork mapping); automated order without proper recipe setup creates invalid_recipe error; automated must define product recipes before order submission

IMAGE REQUIREMENTS ARE PRODUCT-SPECIFIC: Each Gooten product has unique artwork dimensions, resolution, and bleed requirements; automated one-size-fits-all image creates rejected artwork; automated must query product specifications before order

VENDOR ROUTING IS OPAQUE: Gooten routes automatically to best vendor; automated assumption of consistent vendor creates variability in production quality and delivery times; automated must rely on Gooten's quality guarantees rather than vendor-specific SLAs

ENTERPRISE PRICING DIFFERS FROM PUBLIC: Gooten enterprise pricing may differ significantly from public rates; automated public rate assumption for budget planning creates incorrect COGS calculation; automated enterprise deployments should use account-specific pricing

WEBHOOK REGISTRATION IS REQUIRED: Gooten webhooks require explicit URL registration; automated passive webhook assumption creates no event notifications; automated must register webhook endpoint in Gooten dashboard before receiving events
agent_readiness.security_notes: Print-on-demand manufacturing. GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key. US. Order and customer shipping data.

security_score_components.security_notes: POD manufacturing. GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key. US. Order and customer data.
